Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery, Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Arthur Perciante's Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery is moot as responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The court finds that the late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $1,140, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Late opposition has been considered. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Written Discovery, Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Arthur Perciante's Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Sanctions is is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion was filed on February 15, 2008. The motion must be filed and served at least 16 court days prior to the date of hearing. Additionally, a hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
